creator: cmangin@arobas.net
text:
Created attachment 167299
Patch: remove dependency to devel/dbus

net/glib-networking does not depend on the devel/dbus port. It merely exposes a service to dbus and has no dependency to it.

The dependency had already been removed in r353764 but seems to have been mistakenly re-added in r372768.

Patch attached
